'''âd-t-b-r''' ('''kadatberoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jangle|jangle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jangle|jangle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-t-b-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadatberoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidatberoko|thidatberoko]] || [[word:jidatberoko|jidatberoko]] || [[word:shidatberoko|shidatberoko]] || [[word:kidatberoko|kidatberoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudatberoko|thuthudatberoko]] || [[word:jujudatberoko|jujudatberoko]] || [[word:shushudatberoko|shushudatberoko]] || [[word:kukudatberoko|kukudatberoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudatberoko|thudatberoko]] || [[word:judatberoko|judatberoko]] || [[word:shudatberoko|shudatberoko]] || [[word:kudatberoko|kudatberoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudatberoko|thudatberoko]] || [[word:judatberoko|judatberoko]] || [[word:shudatberoko|shudatberoko]] || [[word:kudatberoko|kudatberoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedatberoko|thedatberoko]] || [[word:jedatberoko|jedatberoko]] || [[word:shedatberoko|shedatberoko]] || [[word:kedatberoko|kedatberoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodatberoko|thothodatberoko]] || [[word:jojodatberoko|jojodatberoko]] || [[word:shoshodatberoko|shoshodatberoko]] || [[word:kokodatberoko|kokodatberoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodatberoko|thodatberoko]] || [[word:jodatberoko|jodatberoko]] || [[word:shodatberoko|shodatberoko]] || [[word:kodatberoko|kodatberoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodatberoko|thodatberoko]] || [[word:jodatberoko|jodatberoko]] || [[word:shodatberoko|shodatberoko]] || [[word:kodatberoko|kodatberoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdatberoko|thĂŠdatberoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdatberoko|jĂŠdatberoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdatberoko|shĂŠdatberoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdatberoko|kĂŠdatberoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadatberoko|thathadatberoko]] || [[word:jajadatberoko|jajadatberoko]] || [[word:shashadatberoko|shashadatberoko]] || [[word:kakadatberoko|kakadatberoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadatberoko|thadatberoko]] || [[word:jadatberoko|jadatberoko]] || [[word:shadatberoko|shadatberoko]] || [[word:kadatberoko|kadatberoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadatberoko|thadatberoko]] || [[word:jadatberoko|jadatberoko]] || [[word:shadatberoko|shadatberoko]] || [[word:kadatberoko|kadatberoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadatberithi|shadatberithi]] || [[word:shadatberiji|shadatberiji]] || [[word:shadatberishi|shadatberishi]] || [[word:shadatberiki|shadatberiki]]
